scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:back && npm run build:front && npm run build:electron
scripts.dev:back:sqlite: set DB_DIALECT=sqlite&& set DB_STORAGE=back\data\app-dev.sqlite&& npm --prefix back run dev
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k "npm run dev:back" "npm run dev:front" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:desktop:app: concurrently -k "npm run dev:back:sqlite" "npm run dev:front" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.coverage:sonar: npm run coverage:back && npm run coverage:front && npm run coverage:convert && npx sonar-scanner
